steps.title: Introduce the goal clearly
steps.content: The sentence first states that no birder has achieved the ultimate goal. The words after the blank define that goal: catching an in-person glimpse of all 10,000-plus bird species. A colon can introduce that explanatory phrase.

steps.title: Reject faulty boundaries
steps.content: A has no punctuation, so the definition runs into the noun. B turns the defining phrase into a fragment. D uses a semicolon, which requires an independent clause after it, but the phrase after the blank is not independent. The answer is C.
